sourcePrompt: A small inflatable rubber raiding raft for SEAL and recon teams, about four meters long. Fat rounded buoyancy tubes form the sides and meet at a blunt upturned bow, with a squared transom at the stern; the floor is flat with visible slats, rope grab lines loop along the outer tubes, and two wooden paddles lie across the thwarts. Matte black rubber throughout, low-profile and silent-looking.
